channel.title: Major Digest - Reliable and Comprehensive News Sources: tech
channel.description: Get the latest news online at Major Digest, the top online news resource for the most reliable news sources. Stay informed about the world around you!

image.title: Major Digest - Reliable and Comprehensive News Sources: tech

item.title: Not exactly a DeepSeek moment for AI accelerators - but this Chinese optical chip may well be 100x faster than Nvidia's A100 on some tasks
item.description: Chinese photonic AI chips demonstrate extreme speed and energy efficiency in narrowly defined generative workloads, exceeding conventional GPU performance in lab tests.
item.dc:creator: Efosa Udinmwen, TechRadar

item.title: Space X plans to lower Starlink satellites’ orbital altitude
item.description: Space X plans to lower the orbit of all Starlink satellites in 2026, Reuters reports. According to the private space company’s chief technology officer Michael Nicolls, the orbit of the satellites will be lowered from about 550 to 480 kilometers. The aim is to increase safety in space.
item.dc:creator: Computer World

item.title: TechRadar's Year in Review 2025 – the biggest trends in AI, phones, computing, TVs, gaming and more
item.description: It's been quite the year for tech! Here's our round up of the biggest trends in phones, computing, TVs, gaming, cameras, streaming and more in 2025.
item.dc:creator: TechRadar Team, TechRadar

item.title: How to watch The Traitors UK season 4
item.description: Claudia Winkleman and her lavish wardrobe return to Ardross Castle for a new 12-episode civilian series. Here's how to watch The Traitors UK season 4 online.
item.dc:creator: Aatif Sulleyman, TechRadar

item.title: Il principale proposito per i CIO: creare un 2026 ricco di visioni
item.description: La confusione abbonda nel mondo tecnologico di oggi. In questo momento di caos centrifugo amplificato dall’AI, le organizzazioni hanno bisogno del focus unificante – e sintetizzante – di visioni tecnologiche comprensibili e realizzabili.
item.dc:creator: CIO

item.title: FAA ramps up billions in spending as ‘down payment’ for air traffic overhaul
item.description: The agency expects to spend more than $6 billion this year to lay the groundwork for a complete overhaul of the rapidly aging air traffic control system. The post FAA ramps up billions in spending as ‘down payment’ for air traffic overhaul first appeared on Federal News Network.
item.dc:creator: Jared Serbu, Federal News Network

item.title: China requires chipmakers to use at least 50% domestic equipment
item.description: According to Reuters, China is now requiring its chipmakers to use at least 50% domestically made equipment when expanding their production capacity. The rule is not publicly documented, but chipmakers must show that at least half of their equipment is Chinese to get government approval.
item.dc:creator: Network World

item.title: The top Google Pixel tips of 2025
item.description: More and more, there are Android tips — and then there are Pixel tips. Owning a Google Pixel phone has become a ticket of sorts to a uniquely top-tier type of Android experience.
item.dc:creator: Computer World

item.title: What's inside Mexico's Popocatépetl? Scientists obtain first 3D images of the whole volcano
item.description: Scientists from Mexico’s National Autonomous University have created the first three-dimensional image of the Popocatépetl volcano's interior.
item.dc:creator: María Verza, Associated Press, Local 4

item.title: SoftBank expands AI infrastructure ambitions with $4B DigitalBridge acquisition
item.description: SoftBank Group has announced plans to acquire DigitalBridge Group, an asset manager specializing in digital infrastructure investments such as data centers, cell towers, and fiber networks, in a deal valued at $4 billion.
item.dc:creator: Network World

item.title: React2Shell: Anatomy of a max-severity flaw that sent shockwaves through the web
item.description: The React 19 library for building application interfaces was hit with a remote code vulnerability, React2Shell, about a month ago. However, as researchers delve deeper into the bug, the larger picture gradually unravels.
item.dc:creator: Info World

item.title: 4 New Year’s resolutions for devops success
item.description: It has been a dramatic and challenging year for developers and engineers working in devops organizations. More companies are using AI and automation for both development and IT operations, including for writing requirements, maintaining documentation, and vibe coding.
item.dc:creator: Info World

item.title: Pornhub hit by massive user data leak exposing 200 million records
item.description: ShinyHunters claims responsibility for stealing 94GB of Pornhub user data affecting over 200 million records and demands Bitcoin ransom.
item.dc:creator: Fox News
